Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Feb-21-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. CHRISTOPHER CHAPLIN, Esq. of Fisher & Phillips LLP (Tel: 213-330-4500) for Defendants.
No other appearances.

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT IGS SOLUTIONS, LLC, POSITIVE VIBE DBA FLIGHT, STIIIZY, INC., SHRYNE GROUP, INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration.

Matter not argued/ contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendants IGS Solutions, LLC, Positive Vibe dba Flight, Stiiizy and Shryne's motion to compel arbitration and stay proceedings is granted.

Order signed. (See word minutes/ signed order for complete ruling.)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Court reporter: Anne Pothier, CSR# 9262 (Tel: 614-809-7353/E-mail: divadigits@aol.com). (302/RBU)
